base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brinstar_skree_dive — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. Skree — ceiling-hanging bat that dives at Samus then explodes into 4 projectiles on impact. 2-frame hanging/diving cycle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Skree — ceiling-hanging bat that dives at Samus then explodes into 4 projectiles on impact. 2-frame hanging/diving cycle
